## Checklist

- [ ] I have added or updated tests in `tests/test_<service>.py`
- [ ] I have added or updated documentation in `docs/<service>.md`
- [ ] `make lint` passes with no new errors
- [ ] `make test` passes with no failures
- [ ] I have not committed any AWS credentials or secrets
